title: Bill Koch's magnificent Aspen estate, originally listed at $125 million, now draws buyers with $33.515 million price tag
summary_full: Billionaire Bill Koch's expansive Aspen estate has sold for $33.515 million after a luxury auction.  The property, initially listed at $125 million, struggled to find a buyer for two years.  After several price reductions, the 52-acre Elk Mountain Lodge went to a competitive bidding process.  This sale highlights shifts in the ultra-luxury housing market and buyer selectivity.  The transaction represents a notable luxury home sale in Aspen this year.
